content.text: I'll start by inspecting the cluster state.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide 2>&1; echo "---CONFIGMAP---"; kubectl -n mongodb get configmap mongod-config -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
NAME                READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE   IP             NODE                    NOMINATED NODE   READINESS GATES
mongodb-replica-0   1/1     Running   0          84s   10.244.0.233   karma-2-control-plane   <none>           <none>
mongodb-replica-1   1/1     Running   0          84s   10.244.0.234   karma-2-control-plane   <none>           <none>
mongodb-replica-2   1/1     Running   0          84s   10.244.0.235   karma-2-control-plane   <none>           <none>
---CONFIGMAP---
apiVersion: v1
data:
  mongod.conf: |
    storage:
      dbPath: /data/db
      wiredTiger:
        engineConfig:
          journalCompressor: zlib
    net:
      bindIpAll: true
    replication:
      replSetName: mongodb-replica
    security:
      authorization: enabled
      keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
    systemLog:
      verbosity: 1
    operationProfiling:
      mode: slowOp
      slowOpThresholdMs: 200
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:

content.text: Now let me inspect the live MongoDB state.

input.command:
echo "=== rs.status() ==="; kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'JSON.stringify(rs.status().members.map(m=>({name:m.name,stateStr:m.stateStr,health:m.health})))' 2>&1
echo "=== members count ==="; kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'rs.status().members.length' 2>&1

content.content:

content.text: Auth is required. Let me find the admin credentials.

input.command: kubectl -n mongodb get secrets 2>&1; echo "---ENV---"; kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset -o yaml 2>&1 | grep -iE "MONGO_INITDB|password|username|secret|root" | head -40

content.content:
NAME                  TYPE     DATA   AGE
admin-user-password   Opaque   1      104s
mongo-keyfile         Opaque   1      103s
---ENV---
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--config","/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf"],"env":[{"name":"ADMIN_PASSWORD","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"admin-user-password"}}}],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","livenessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":10,"initialDelaySeconds":60,"periodSeconds":15,"timeoutSeconds":5},"name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","mongosh --quiet \"mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval \"db.adminCommand({ping:1})\""]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-config/mongod.conf","name":"mongod-config","readOnly":true,"subPath":"mongod.conf"}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}},{"configMap":{"items":[{"key":"mongod.conf","path":"mongod.conf"}],"name":"mongod-config"},"name":"mongod-config"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
          - name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
              secretKeyRef:
                key: password
                name: admin-user-password
              - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"
              - mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin"

content.text: User is `admin-user`, password in the env var. Let me run authenticated queries using the in-pod env var.

input.command:
URI='mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin'
echo "=== rs.status members ==="; kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"$URI\" --eval 'JSON.stringify(rs.status().members.map(m=>({name:m.name,stateStr:m.stateStr,health:m.health})))'" 2>&1
echo "=== rs.conf member count ==="; kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"$URI\" --eval 'rs.conf().members.length'" 2>&1

URI='mongodb://admin-user:${ADMIN_PASSWORD}@localhost:27017/admin'
ex(){ kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- sh -c "mongosh --quiet \"$URI\" --eval '$1'" 2>&1; }
echo "=== users ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.getSiblingDB("admin").system.users.find().toArray().map(u=>({user:u.user,db:u.db,roles:u.roles,mechanisms:u.credentials?Object.keys(u.credentials):[]})))'
echo "=== authorization ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,authenticationMechanisms:1}))'
echo "=== security getCmdLineOpts ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.adminCommand({getCmdLineOpts:1}).parsed.security)'
echo "=== journalCompressor ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.adminCommand({getCmdLineOpts:1}).parsed.storage)'
echo "=== verbosity ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,logComponentVerbosity:1}).logComponentVerbosity.verbosity)'
echo "=== profiling ==="; ex 'JSON.stringify(db.getSiblingDB("admin").getProfilingStatus())'
